name: Victoria International Marina
description: World-class, custom-built moorage for yachts over 20m (65′) LOA. Sets the standard in upscale security and safety, amenities, concierge services and crew facilities. A sanctuary at the gateway to British Columbia’s Pacific Northwest and Inside Passage.

raw_tags.description: World-class, custom-built moorage for yachts over 20m (65′) LOA. Sets the standard in upscale security and safety, amenities, concierge services and crew facilities. A sanctuary at the gateway to British Columbia’s Pacific Northwest and Inside Passage.
raw_tags.name: Victoria International Marina
raw_tags.note: Access restricted to vessels over 20m. Strict harbour traffic procedures in effect, please contact the marina office for information before attempting to approach/access the marina.
